name: US Cash Advance
description_short: US Cash Advance offers payday loans, cash advances, and bad credit loans up to $50,000 with same-day funding at a Detroit-area storefront.
description_long:
US Cash Advance operates a physical lending location in Detroit, Michigan, specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions for consumers with varying credit profiles. The company markets itself as a fast-access lender for individuals facing urgent financial needs, with a stated focus on speed and accessibility. Their service model combines in-person consultations with online application options, positioning themselves as a bridge between traditional banking and alternative lending. The company processes applications through what they describe as a "fast process" and maintains customer service hours extending into evening and weekend hours to accommodate working individuals.

The company offers multiple loan products including payday loans (typically $1,000 or less), cash advances, bad credit loans (ranging $250–$50,000), same-day loans, and personal loans. All advertised products accept applicants regardless of credit history and are marketed as unsecured loans requiring no collateral. Their stated benefits include minimal paperwork requirements, no credit checks for some products, and flexibility in fund usage. The application process involves completing an online form, connection with a third-party lender, receiving an offer, signing a contract, and receiving funds.

US Cash Advance distinguishes itself through localized in-person service, with customer reviews highlighting the helpfulness of specific staff members (notably "Doris") and quick processing times (under 45 minutes to 2-3 hours reported). Reviews emphasize transparent fee disclosure and straightforward repayment explanations. The company markets accessibility for bad-credit borrowers as a core differentiator, with multiple reviews praising approval despite poor credit histories.

The company operates within a high-risk lending category with inherent limitations. Website content lacks specific APR disclosures, repayment terms, or fee structures—critical information for informed borrowing. Customer reviews mention "low-interest payday loans" but the industry standard for such products typically involves triple-digit APRs. The business model depends on rapid, short-term debt cycles. No independent verification of advertised benefits or rates is available from the website. This remains a viable emergency option for same-day cash needs but requires consumers to independently verify all terms before commitment.
address: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd Suite G, Jacksonville, FL 32257

company_info.headquarters: 10561 Old St Augustine Rd Suite G, Jacksonville, FL 32257

pros: In-person service with reported processing times under 45 minutes to 2 hours
Accepts all credit types including bad credit applicants
Extended hours (8am–9pm weekdays, 10am–7pm weekends) for working individuals
Multiple loan products ranging from $100 to $50,000
Staff receives specific praise for transparent fee disclosure and patient explanations
cons: Website contains no specific APR, interest rate, or fee disclosure—critical terms are opaque
Heavy reliance on third-party lenders obscures actual terms and conditions
High-cost debt product category with typical industry APRs exceeding 300%
Limited online functionality (reviews mention lack of online pre-approval despite online application option)
Physical location constraint limits accessibility to Detroit-area residents
best_for: Individuals in the Detroit area needing same-day or next-day emergency cash ($100–$1,000)
Consumers with poor credit history who are unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Borrowers facing urgent expenses (medical bills, car repairs) who prefer in-person consultation
diagnosis: US Cash Advance is best for Detroit-area residents requiring immediate cash ($100–$1,000) who lack access to traditional credit and can tolerate high-cost short-term borrowing. The primary caveat is the complete absence of disclosed terms—APR, fees, and repayment schedules are not provided online, requiring in-person consultation to understand true borrowing costs before commitment.
